utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Pretty great ! Except I did get a little attitude from the robot .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Damn those robots , they are supposed to be our faithful servants !

emotion_cause.span: 1_I did get a little attitude from the robot .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Anyway , it was not the robot , it was the guy who controls him .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Yeah , he does not like me .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: He had C . H . E . E . S . E .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: knock over the sandwich right when I was reaching for one !

emotion_cause.span: 6_knock over the sandwich right when I was reaching for one !
6_knock over the sandwich right when I was reaching for one !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Well , why do not you just get him fired ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I may have to , I hate to do it , but I am the star !

emotion_cause.span: 6_knock over the sandwich right when I was reaching for one !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: There is a limit to how many sandwiches I can eat off the floor .

utterances.speaker: Estelle
utterances.text: Joe ! I am glad I found you , I got an audition for you !

utterances.speaker: Estelle
utterances.text: The thing is it is kinda on the Q . T .

utterances.speaker: Estelle
utterances.text: The actor who has the part does not know he might be fired .

utterances.speaker: Estelle
utterances.text: It is the lead in a series , Mac and C . H . E . E . S . E .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I am the lead in Mac and C . H . E . E . S . E . ! !

emotion_cause.span: 19_I am the lead in Mac and C . H . E . E . S . E . ! !
